name_fa: نیروی زمینی سپاه پاسداران انقلاب اسلامی
description: The IRGC Ground Forces Command is the largest branch of the [Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) by personnel, responsible for conventional ground operations, border security, and internal defence. It controls numerous infantry and armoured divisions deployed across Iran's provinces and along contested borders. [Mohammad Pakpour](/people/mohammad-pakpour) commanded the IRGC Ground Forces from 2014 to 2025 before his appointment as IRGC Commander-in-Chief. The Ground Forces played a major role in operations during the Iran–Iraq War, Kurdish insurgency suppression, and have maintained a forward presence along the western and northwestern borders. During the 2019 Mahabad and border crackdowns it acted as a primary enforcement arm.

sources.title: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Ground Forces — Wikipedia
Iran's Military Forces and Warfighting Capabilities — CSIS
sources.publisher: Center for Strategic and International Studies

editorial_notes: Pakpour commanded IRGC Ground Forces 2014–2025 before becoming IRGC C-in-C.
